Petition By John E. O'Grady, Proposed Administrator, For Prior Approval Of Right To Compensation As Admin. And For Services As Attorney For The Admin.
Off Calendar Jan-02-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John O'Grady in Propria Persona.

Mr. O'Grady presented oral argument to support his position with respect to receiving dual compensation as attorney and personal representative stating that it is a small estate but that it has a lot of on line accounts and bit coins, that the parents have no one here to administer the estate, that he is helping the grieving parents and also doing legal work, and that the parents want him to be compensated. The Petition for Compensation as Administrator and Attorney was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
